subcodes.first_line: The world hath been thrown into turmoil through the discord among nations; thus have lamentations been raised up and ranks have appeared. Fear ye [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انقلب العالم بما اختلف الامم بذلک ارتفع سلیل الوف و ظهرت الصفوف اتقوا
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @chastisement and requital, @universal peace; world unity
